description_long: This is a tall, rectangular apartment building with a modern, utilitarian design, featuring a main tower rising above a lower, wider base section. The structure is composed of multiple evenly spaced floors, each marked by horizontal bands of windows that wrap around the building. The base of the building is supported by a series of visible columns or stilts, giving it an elevated appearance and possibly allowing for parking or open space beneath. The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern, contributing to the building's symmetrical and orderly facade. The exterior appears to be made primarily of concrete or a similar material, with a monochromatic, light gray finish. There are no visible balconies or decorative elements, emphasizing a functional and minimalist architectural style.
description: A tall, modern apartment building with a grid of windows and a raised base supported by columns, finished in light gray concrete. The design is minimalist and functional, with no balconies or ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main tower and the lower base section, with visible supporting columns beneath the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the base section and the alignment of the supporting columns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full height of the tower and the regular window grid, with the base section extending to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the symmetry of the tower and the continuation of the supporting columns.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly regular, grid-like pattern with even horizontal and vertical spacing across all visible facades.
